emails.subject: Re: Mary Kay Makeup
emails.body: Please help me friend with the questions below. She is getting it ready for my mom this weekend. I am attaching your order so please find out send back to me. She wants to make sure that she gets the correct stuff. Your Order: Dana Davis (work): 2 acne treatment gels 2 cleaners #2 1 oil control lotion #3 2 purifying bars revitalizing mask 2 mahogany bronze #2 make-u 1 bronze loose powder 2 light bronze loose powders 2 conditioning eye make-up remover Forwarded by Jennifer Reed/HOU/ECT on 12/08/2000 11:36 AM HEIDIMVALERIUS@aol.com on 12/08/2000 11:25:19 AM

emails.subject: Re: Mary Kay Makeup
emails.body: YOur makeup ios here the total is $94.50 compared to $157.50. That is a good deal for all that she ordered. I need a check ASAP made out to HEIDI VALERIUS. Please let me know when you wil have the check so I can bring you the makeup. Enron North America Corp. From: Dana Davis 12/08/2000 03:01 PM
